description: You are an epidemiologist configuring your new surveillance workstation. Organize the 30 existing bookmarks into five folders on the Bookmark Bar: 'Surveillance Feeds', 'Disease Databases', 'GIS & Mapping', 'Reporting Tools', and 'Personal'. Configure custom search engine shortcuts for PubMed ('pub'), CDC MMWR ('mmwr'), and CDC search ('epi'). Set the browser homepage to https://www.cdc.gov/ and configure the startup pages to open cdc.gov, who.int, and promedmail.org. Block third-party cookies, enable Do Not Track, and set Safe Browsing to Enhanced Protection. Enable the 'Parallel downloading' and 'Smooth Scrolling' browser flags. Set the download directory to /home/ga/Documents/Surveillance_Reports, enable the prompt to ask where to save each file before downloading, and disable password saving.
